dimensions.question: Do the constitutions cover all necessary behavioral boundaries?

assessment.evidence: Asimov (6 articles) + Default (11 articles) + Mandate + Harm Taxonomy = comprehensive coverage

dimensions.question: Do the policies cover all operational governance needs?

assessment.evidence: 9 policies covering alignment, rollback, self-modification, kaizen, reconnaissance, scientific objectivity, streeling, governance audit, autonomous loops

dimensions.note: May need additional policies as consumer repos integrate

dimensions.question: Do the personas cover all necessary agent roles?

assessment.evidence: 7 personas defined, but reflective-architect and system-integrator lack dedicated behavioral tests

dimensions.question: Are consumer repos (ix, tars, ga) effectively governed?

assessment.evidence: Galactic Protocol defined, templates exist, but no consumer repo has adopted state/ directory or CLAUDE.md snippet yet

dimensions.question: Is the Streeling framework effectively transferring knowledge?

assessment.evidence: Seldon persona exists, Streeling policy defined, 4 NotebookLM notebooks indexed, weekly harvest scheduled. No knowledge state objects created yet.

dimensions.question: Is the governance framework improving itself?

assessment.evidence: Evolution schema, confidence calibration, promotion protocol all defined. No compounding cycles have run yet. This is the first self-assessment.

dimensions.question: Has the governance framework been tested in practice?

assessment.evidence: GA chatbot Ralph Loop executed successfully with 3-agent team. Directive issued, governance boundaries enforced, all tasks shipped. First real governance operation.

overall_assessment.summary: Governance framework is architecturally complete but operationally untested in most dimensions. The GA chatbot Ralph Loop proved the directive/loop mechanism works. Next priority: consumer repo integration and sustained compounding cycles to build evidence.

next_actions: Run first full compounding cycle with /demerzel compound
Integrate consumer repos with CLAUDE.md snippets and state/ directories
Add behavioral tests for reflective-architect and system-integrator
Create first knowledge state objects via Seldon teaching
Track governance decisions to build evolution log data
